hypothesis: v1.5 can prepare portable codex exec worker artifacts and import schema-backed results into the same exploration ledger.
probe: Inspect generated worker artifacts and import this schema-valid mock result.

actions.result: Generated prompt, PowerShell runner, copied schema, and portable worker manifest.
Used finish-worker to validate and append the worker result.

evidence.supports: The worker manifest stores relative artifact names in portable mode.
The generated runner uses the official codex exec CLI with --output-schema, --output-last-message, and --json.

reflection: The v1.5 adapter closes the gap between manual ledger rounds and official codex exec workers while keeping public artifacts portable.
next_probe: Forward-test one real codex exec worker in a disposable scratch workspace when model/runtime cost is acceptable.
